site.name: Wing Yee AI Lab
site.tagline: Bringing practical AI into everyday healthcare.

thinking.title: Observe
thinking.body: Identify real healthcare workflow pain points.

thinking.title: Understand
thinking.body: Map patient, clinician, and operational needs.

thinking.title: Build
thinking.body: Prototype usable tools, workflows, and demos.

thinking.title: Improve
thinking.body: Iterate through feedback and real-world context.

impactAreas.title: Patient Experience
impactAreas.description: Using immersive and creative technology to improve healthcare communication, education, and emotional experience.

projects.name: Projection Mapping
projects.problem: Traditional presentations can feel flat for education, relaxation and patient-facing communication.
projects.value: Creates an immersive visual experience for patient education, relaxation and presentation.

projects.name: AI Music & Video
projects.problem: Healthcare messages often need a more emotional and accessible format.
projects.value: Uses AI-generated media for patient engagement, education and storytelling.

projects.name: Immersive Web Prototype
projects.problem: Complex ideas need clearer spatial and visual explanation.
projects.value: A responsive 3D scrollytelling experiment for healthcare communication and presentation.

projects.name: Yoga Room / Patient Relaxation Visual Experience
projects.problem: Care environments need calmer digital experiences that support wellbeing.
projects.value: A future immersive relaxation layer for patient comfort and emotional care.

impactAreas.title: Clinical Workflow
impactAreas.description: Using AI and digital tools to reduce repetitive clinical workload and improve ward efficiency.

projects.name: Roster Automation
projects.problem: Roster planning is time-consuming and difficult to balance fairly.
projects.value: AI-assisted roster generation designed to improve fairness, usability and planning efficiency.

projects.name: Smart Ward Reception
projects.problem: Visitor and bell inquiries interrupt clinical staff before the need is understood.
projects.value: A tablet-based inquiry system that helps identify visitor needs before interrupting clinical staff.

projects.name: AI Feedback Assistant
projects.problem: Feedback handling can be repetitive, slow and inconsistent.
projects.value: Classifies feedback sentiment, drafts replies and keeps human approval before sending.

projects.name: Nursing Workflow Assistant
projects.problem: Nursing teams need practical support for repeated information and coordination tasks.
projects.value: A future AI workflow assistant for clinical task support and ward efficiency.

impactAreas.title: Healthcare Intelligence
impactAreas.description: Using AI agents and automation to improve knowledge flow, decision support, and operational awareness.

projects.name: Hermes AI Agent
projects.problem: AI developments move too quickly to follow manually.
projects.value: A daily AI intelligence pipeline that summarizes fast-changing AI updates.

projects.name: n8n Workflow
projects.problem: Administrative and communication processes often repeat across teams.
projects.value: Backend workflow automation for repetitive administrative or communication processes.

projects.name: Multimodal Agent
projects.problem: Healthcare information is not only text; it can include images, voice and context.
projects.value: Exploring multimodal agents for richer clinical and educational workflows.

projects.name: Multi-agent Healthcare Workflow
projects.problem: Clinical, operational and educational tasks often need coordinated support.
projects.value: Exploring how multiple AI agents can support healthcare workflow tasks together.
